feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
feed.subtitle: SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HI Community Members,In SAP Ariba B&I, is there any way to make a dropdown Seelction field availab
entry.content:
Hi, Community Members,

In SAP Ariba B&I, is there any way to make Master Data-"Commodity Code with HSN" available at Supplier Ariba Portal as dropdown Selection field to Select while creating a Non- PO Invoice.?

entry.title: Career Advice: Choosing Between SAP Ariba, EWM, and PP
entry.content:
Hello, 

I’m an Industrial Engineer with no prior work experience, but I speak four languages — English, German, Turkish, and Arabic. I’ve recently completed hands-on training in SAP MM and am now planning to learn another SAP module to strengthen my career path.

My goal is to build a strong professional profile and find good job opportunities in the Gulf region, where SAP is in high demand. I want to choose a module that aligns with my industrial engineering background, complements my SAP MM knowledge, leverages my language skills, and offers long-term career stability — even with the growing impact of AI and automation.

Currently, I’m considering 1) SAP Ariba(e.g., Procurement, Supplier Management, Sourcing ..) and 2) SAP EWM. I am also thinking about SAP PP, but I believe its opportunities are limited, as it is mostly confined to the industrial sector. Additionally, I would like advice on whether to focus on Cloud Private Edition or On-Premise for SAP MM and the next module.

Which module and deployment type would you recommend to help me stay competitive and future-proof my career in the Gulf market?

Thank you very much for your advice!

entry.title: Need to update HSN code in PR/PO during creation from ARIBA Guided Buying to SAP S4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Dear All,

We are trying to integrate PR from ARIBA GUIDED BUYING to SAP S4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD and further create PO.

We have created PR in SAP S4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD. Further using Automatic PO creation app, we are creating PO. 

For india country, we have BR_NCM field for HSN code in PO item. But the same field is not available in PR item. How we can achieve this updating of HSN/SAC code in PO India tab from ARIBA GB.

Is there anyway, can we directly initiate creation of PO from ARIBA GB ? If no, what we can do for HSN code field?

Regards

Sudharsanan

entry.title: Ariba Invoice : Total Amount not getting added correctly
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am facing issue in Invoice for 1 supplier only. Where the Invoice total amount is not calculated correctly leaving the tax amount. By looking at the post processing payload the tax value(MWSBT :17.92)  is not added to the net price(BETRG:94.29).

In my below screenshot on the left side is the issue payload where Net Price + Tax is not calculated to the field "SUMME".

Right side screenshot is for different supplier payload where the Total amount is calculated correctly.

I could see a difference in 2 field's MSATZ and TXJCD value differs i.e  MSATZ = 19.000 & TXJCD = 3  / 1 . Is this causing any issue? What could be the reason?

entry.title: SAP Ariba and SAP Ariba Central Invoice Managemrnt
entry.content:
if I want to buy SAP Ariba CIM for my invoices that are not on SAP Ariba, how can I integrate  data from the 2 sources? 
also, can I just replace SAP Ariba with SAP Ariba CIM without impacting my suppliers at all?

entry.title: Showing deneied Purchase Requisitions in the To Do list in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Dear professionals,

Our customer wants to display deneid PRs on  To-Do list in SAP Ariba Dashbord.

Are there any possible methods or workarounds?

 

Thank you

entry.title: Prametric Catalog Items in 3EN Szenario
entry.content:
Hello,

In my Ariba Buying project, the client wants to use parametric catalog items. For example with T-Shirt size: S, M, L as a parametric field. The integration scenario is 3EN with Central Procurement. Ariba therefore creates a PR in Central Procurement.

The question is: how is the parametric data transferred from Ariba to the PR in Central Procurement? What is the best practice standard for this?

Thanks and regards, Christian

entry.title: Hello Experts, one of the SES is stuck in "Rejecting" status in Ariba.
entry.content:
Hello Experts, one of the SES is stuck in "Rejecting" status in Ariba, it was supposed to reach ECC via CIG, could you provide your expertise & help me resolve / trouble shoot the issue, please. 

Normal expected behaviour: SES rejected in Ariba > Message reaches CIG > update in ECC.

Current behaviour: SES stuck in Ariba itself (in Rejecting status) for days, the message not reached CIG (not appearing in TT).

entry.title: Harmonised System codes from catalogue item in Guided Buying
entry.content:
I have a supplier catalogue that uses HS codes for classification.  I have these mapped to unspsc.  What I'd like is for the HS code to be visible on the requisition at line level, and able to report on it, as currently the commodity code shown is the ERP one.

Has anyone done anything similar?

Our SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing instance is standalone.

entry.title: Ariba CIG : Service PO mapping not working
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing one issue when trying to do mapping for a Service PO. Where the Quantity & Price value flip happens for both the Service & Material PO. Below is the requirement

Requirement:

If the PReq Item is a service (i.e. Service Start Date <> blank), then map the:

  • PR Qty field -> PO Price field
  • PR Price field -> PO Qty field

Keep PR UoM field mapped to PO UoM field

Note: We have Item Category = 'M' only as per client requirement.

Based on the above requirement we tried mapping in “PurchaseOrderExportRequest”. However, we are facing some challenges in our test environment where the desired output is not achievable.

  • Steps Performed: PR Qty field -> PO Price field

1) Mapped Quantity (PurchOrdScheduleDetails_Item) to NET_PRICE(PO_ITEMS)

  •  
  • 2) Added Source condition to the Custom Date (Custom Section)

     

  • 3) Created PR5373. Has 2-line items:

1st Line item has a Commodity code as 'Service' , Service Start & End Date are not blank & Item Category = 'M'. - Here the value flip is successful

Payload: 1st Lineitem

2nd Line item has a Commodity code as 'Equipment' ,Service Start & End Date are Blank , Item Category = 'M'. - Here also the value flip happens which should not happen.

Payload 2nd line item:

 

I believe it is because of looping Custom field takes consideration of the field text(ServiceStartDate) alone in the mapping without considering if it has got a value or not.

So, we would like to understand how we can overcome this situation where we need only Quantity & Price should flip when the “ServiceStartDate” <> Blank. ?

If I add a new Custom Field for Service PO as “Service Flag” in the same Custom section.

Question:  Will the new Custom field will have the same impact just like the above mapping where the mapping will not consider whether the field is Blank / not Blank when present in the Custom section?

entry.title: Is it possible to add an approval queue dynamically to a workflow? SAP Ariba
entry.content:
My invoice workflow starts with a designated business contact who often provides additional information to AP.  They have to manually add AP into the flow so that they can provide their information and send it back for correction.  I'd like to dynamically add AP to the flow when the OBO contains "Default" and the prior approver is Designated Business Contact - then Add AP Invoice Returns to the queue. 

Is this a customization that SAP can do?

entry.title: Is there any purchasing units import API in SAP Ariba
entry.content: I want to import purchasing units data from third-party system to Ariba system. I know that we can use import purchasing units task to import csv file to Ariba through ITK, But i think ITK have some disadvantage.  I want to implement this business scenario through an API call. Do you have some best practices ?

entry.title: SAP-ARIBA -Vendors need to see only their payment terms
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently the selected vendors in SAP ARIBA can see the whole list of payment terms (which are required to derive payment methods) which belong to other vendors as well, it runs the risk of selecting the wrong one which belong to other vendors .  Currently multiple vendors payment terms have been configured in SAP ECC system.  If the selected vendors in  SAP ARIBA can see the payment terms which belong to them only, it could be a feasible solution. Can someone help how this can be achieved, if at all any configuration is missing or any development/enhancement is required.

Cheers

Sanjay

entry.title: SAP POs to Ariba B&I without Commerce Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I wanted to check if there is a way that we can send Purchase Orders Originated from SAP S/4 HANA to SAP Ariba B&I without Commerce Automation License? Has anyone done this? I am aware that with Commerce automation license we will be able to do a PO Copy from Network to SAP B&I for POs originating in S/4 or ECC.

We have SAP S/4 HANA where POs will be created, we don't have Commerce Automation license and we have SAP Ariba B&I Solution (Suite Integrated). We can't move our Ordering to Ariba B&I for some reason, but we would like the PO created in SAP S/4 to be available in Ariba B&I as a copy and at the same time if Network can send this PO to Supplier.

Please confirm if this is feasible at all if we have BTP license with us.

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Joule in Ariba Guided Buying: “Open in App” fails – sap.ushell.Container undefined, Fiori 3 CSS
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m seeing an issue with Joule “Open in App” in SAP Ariba Guided Buying and wanted to check if anyone has faced this before.

What I’m doing:
From Joule, I see a list of recent Purchase Requisitions. When I click Open in App on a PR, it should take me to the full Guided Buying PR screen.

What happens instead:
I get an error saying “The application could not be opened”, and nothing opens.

What I noticed while checking in browser tools:

  • Console shows messages like:

    • Unable to handle navigation with payload

    • No sap.ushell Container found

  • A CSS file does not load:
    /gb/sap_fiori_3_fonts.css
    This request returns 500 Internal Server Error and JSON instead of CSS.

    My questions:

    • Is this a known Guided Buying / Joule issue?

    • Does “Open in App” require any specific tenant or shell configuration?

    • Has anyone seen this issue and found a fix, or is raising an SAP ticket the only option?

      I have Added the screenshots in the following

       

    Any pointers would be really helpful.
    Thanks in advance!

entry.title: P Card Receiving
entry.content:
Some users in our institute have P cards, and they are allowed to buy materials for direct projects and we would like to track that spend and match it to the project. There are 2 problems:

1) the P Card charge only shows a total amount, and not the quantity ordered, so we have no way to receive against the quantity.

2) We are a government contractor, and on government projects we need to track the actual receipt date. We have to reconcile all items to pay the bill, but if the item is not received yet, the receipt defaults to the transaction date.

What is the best approach to address these issues?

entry.title: SAP ARIBA: GRN Receipt Number still showing in ariba business network even invoice is parked
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

I am facing an issue where the GRN receipt number is still showing in Ariba Business Network even when the invoice has been parked (the receipt number should have been consumed). The invoice status was rejected in the business network however it is parked in SAP.

SAP Ariba Contracts  SAP Ariba Invoicing SAP Ariba Sourcing SAP Ariba Sourcing

entry.title: Multiple Requisitions Upload - Ariba SAP
entry.content: looking for a way to upload Multiple Requisitions within Ariba SAP.  I have multiple I create to generate a Purchase Order. I do about 45-60 Uploads of requisitions a day. however, I don't see an option in Ariba that allows multiple files or bulk uploads.

entry.title: How can Ariba outbound web services directly export data from Ariba to an external system?
entry.content:
Hi experts,
 
I would like to know how to use Ariba outbound-type web services to directly export data from Ariba to an external system.
(outbound SOAP API)
I am working with the following service:
 
ServiceSheetAsyncExport / ServiceSheetRealTimeExport
 
I have already configured:
 
  • Integration Manager
  • End Point Configuration
  • Basic Authentication
 
My questions are:
 
  1. Can this Ariba outbound web service be called directly from an external system (SAP Integration Suite)?
  2. How does Ariba push data to the external endpoint?
 
Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: ME23N: PO Expected to Trigger Message Type NEUG but System Determines NEU.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am facing an issue in ME23N (Purchase Order display).

For a specific PO, the expected output type is NEUG, but the system is instead determining NEU.
I want to understand why NEUG is not getting picked and which logic/routine is overriding it.

I have already checked the basic setup:

  • Condition records exist for NEUG
  • NEUG is configured in NACE → EF (Purchasing)
  • Output type NEU also exists with the same access sequence
  • PO document type is correctly assigned

However, the system still picks NEU instead of NEUG.

Could you please guide me on what to debug and which objects or routines control the PO output determination?

Specifically:

  1. Where should I set breakpoints (FM or includes) to trace NEU/NEUG selection?
  2. Are there any exits/BAdIs (like MM06E005 or user routines in VOFM) that can override message determination?
  3. What should I check in the output access sequence or fields that could cause NEUG to be skipped?
  4. Any standard SAP recommendations for analyzing incorrect output type determination?

Any help or debugging steps would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
